| artifact_type | count | reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| oot_predictions.csv | 16 | Excluded raw row-level prediction records. |
| fold_selected_features.csv | 16 | Excluded fold-level feature records; summarized by stability and frequency tables. |
| llm_rankings_summary.csv | 8 | Excluded LLM ranking detail records and natural-language reasons; not model-result metrics. |
| llm_hybrid_trace.csv | 6 | Excluded hybrid trace records; summarized by final selections and frequency metrics. |
| *.model | 16 | Model binaries are not readable metric tables. |
| *.pkl | 16 | Serialized preprocessing/model artifacts are not report metrics. |
| *.log | 16 | Execution logs are operational traces, not result metrics. |
| _llm_rankings_cache/*.json | 6 | Cache payloads are excluded; LLM usage metrics are summarized from llm_call_summary.csv. |
